subject: physics
title: 18M.1.SL.TZ1.29
question_html:
Three energy sources for power stations are

       I.     fossil fuel

       II.     pumped water storage

       III.     nuclear fuel.

Which energy sources are primary sources?

A.     I and II only

B.     I and III only

C.     II and III only

D.     I, II and III
